cards.back: The process of organizing and managing the interaction among group members to achieve a common goal.
A coordination mechanism in which multiple individuals or groups have exclusive access to a shared resource, preventing any one person or group from accessing it simultaneously.
The mutual understanding and acceptance of a shared goal, plan, or decision among group members, achieved through open and effective communication.
A theoretical framework that explains how groups coordinate their actions and achieve common goals through communication and collaboration.
The process of managing and resolving disagreements and conflicts that arise among group members, promoting a positive and productive group dynamic.
